snippet.title: Bhooth Bangla -Official Teaser | Akshay Kumar, Tabu, Paresh, Wamiqa, Priyadarshan |In Cinemas 10 Apr
snippet.description:
Laughter, screams, and surprises are waiting inside the Bangla. Dare to enter? ü§£üßü‚Äç‚ôÄÔ∏è
#BhoothBanglaTeaser out now!

#BhoothBangla in cinemas on 10th April 2026 üëª

Bhooth Bangla reunites #AkshayKumar with acclaimed director #Priyadarshan after 14 years, promising a delightful blend of comedy, horror, and thrill.

Balaji Telefilms Ltd. in association with Cape Of Good Films present
Bhooth Bangla

Starring: Akshay Kumar, Paresh Rawal, Rajpal Yadav, Tabu, Wamiqa Gabbi, Jisshu Sengupta, Manoj Joshi, Mithila Palkar, Asrani Ji, Rajesh Sharma 
Directed by: Priyadarshan
Produced by: Akshay Kumar, Shobha Kapoor, Ektaa R. Kapoor
Co-producer: Vimal Doshi, Farahjaan Sheikh, Vedant Vikaas Baali
Group CEO & CFO (BTL): Sanjay Dwivedi
Director of Photography: Divakar Mani

Screenplay by: Priyadarshan, Rohan Shankar, Abilash Nair
Dialogues by: Rohan Shankar

Lyrics: Yitendra Mishra & Kumaar

snippet.title: [Hindi] BGIS 2026 | SEMI FINALS | Day 1 #BGMILIVE #BGIS
snippet.description:
The SEMI FINALS of BGIS 2026 begin.

The competition tightens. The stakes rise. There is no margin for error now.

After battling through The Grind, Round stages, Quarter Finals and Wildcard, only the strongest remain. Every match carries weight. Every fight moves teams one step closer to the Grand Finals.

This is where contenders turn into finalists.

Watch the SEMI FINALS live and witness who takes the next step toward the championship stage.

snippet.title: Bhooth Bangla Teaser REVIEW | Deeksha Sharma
snippet.description:
Bhooth Bangla Teaser Review By Deeksha Sharma. Akshay Kumar with Director Priyadarshan is set for Bhooth Bangla Franchise with Tabu & Wamiqa Gabbi in Mysterious Roles of Horror Comedy & Suspense- Bhooth Bangla Teaser is pure Nostalgia of Bhool Bhulaiyaa but falls short in editing & establishing connection of Old Characters in new story. Bhooth Bangla Teaser Trailer Reaction & Full Movie Expectation would be shared in this Video. Can Akshay Kumar challenge Kartik Aaryan for OG Horror Comedy Franchise? Do leave Comments below now!

LYRICS: 
Piya Meri Nas Nas Kyun Dookhei
Balam Meri Nas Nas Kyun Dookhei
Na Hilo Jaye.. Na Chigo
Aaj Meri Chhati Si Toote
Piya Meri Nas Nas Kyun Dookhei...

Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei
Haan Gori Nazar Lagi Deekhei
Ja Sabre Gaam Me Top Lugai Bas Tu Hi Deekhe
Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei...

Haan Ghar Te Nikru Saj Dhaj Ke
Moye Toke Log Lugai
Koi Radua Maare Siti
Dekh Koi Bolo Butterfly

Toye Laad Kare Je Ghar Kunve Ki
Sagri Chachi Tayi
Aur Naam Bata De Raduan Ko
Do Minute Me Karu Kutayi
Haan Tu Bhi Kare Na Laad Piya
Mope Daanti Si Meense

Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei...
Arey Bano Chaudhary Ghoome
Sab Din Mope Kaam Karave
Ho.. Phoonk Jaray Du Ghar Ghoore Ku
Aisi Mann Mein Aave

Arey Raakh Sabar Meri Dhanno
Kayko Tu Itni Ghabrave
Aur Lal Kilo Tere Naam Karay Du
Ek Ber Muskaye De
Moye Dekh Ke Devar Ek Aankh Te
Photo So Kheenche

Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei...
Piya Mero Jee So Cho Ghabrave
Rang Mero Neelo Padto Aawe
Baidh Bulaye De...
Jhaaro Jaldi Tu Moku Lagvaye De...

Mat Na Leve Tension Pyari
Tote Karu Laad Main Bhari..
Chhappar Phaar Kein...
Teri Nazar Utaaru Mantar Maar Kein..

snippet.title: The Hype Is REAL! Dhurandhar 2 Trailer Reaction
snippet.description:
The Dhurandhar 2 trailer is finally here and we couldn‚Äôt wait to watch it! This sequel already looks massive, with bigger action, intense moments, and that larger-than-life style that makes Indian cinema so exciting.

In this video we react to the official Dhurandhar 2 trailer for the first time and share our honest thoughts about the action, the visuals, and what this movie might bring to the story.

Is Dhurandhar 2 about to deliver one of the most epic action experiences yet? This trailer definitely raises the stakes and we break down everything that caught our attention.

If you enjoy authentic movie reactions, trailer reactions, and discovering epic films from around the world, make sure to subscribe and join us for more reactions!

snippet.title: Dhurandhar: The Revenge Trailer reaction | Ranveer Singh | Aditya Dhar
snippet.description:
Finally the wait is over! After two teasers building up the hype, we‚Äôre finally watching the official trailer of Dhurandhar: The Revenge and sharing our reaction with you all. 

Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/ChaatNChat
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/chaatnchats/
Miguel Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/miguelchachu/

This trailer has been highly awaited, and we were really curious to see what the makers reveal this time after keeping things mysterious in the earlier teasers.

The film is directed by Aditya Dhar and stars Ranveer Singh, along with a powerful cast including Sanjay Dutt, R. Madhavan, Arjun Rampal, and Sara Arjun. The story continues the intense spy-action saga, with Ranveer Singh appearing in dual avatars and the revenge storyline taking things to a much bigger level.

Join us as we break down the trailer, talk about the action, the vibe, and everything that stood out. Let us know in the comments what you thought about this trailer and if it lived up to the hype!

#reaction #dhurandhar #trailer #bollywood #ranveersingh #india

snippet.title: DHURANDHAR THE REVENGE Trailer Reaction! | Ranveer Singh | Arjun Rampal | Sanjay Dutt | Aditya Dhar
snippet.description:
Jaby and Achara react to the explosive trailer of the upcoming spy-action sequel Dhurandhar: The Revenge, a high-stakes continuation of the blockbuster franchise directed by Aditya Dhar. The trailer teases an intense revenge-driven story filled with brutal action, political intrigue, and powerful confrontations as the conflict escalates across borders. ‚öîÔ∏èüî•

The film features a powerhouse cast led by Ranveer Singh (Padmaavat, Gully Boy, Bajirao Mastani), alongside Sanjay Dutt (KGF: Chapter 2, Munna Bhai M.B.B.S.), R. Madhavan (Rocketry: The Nambi Effect, 3 Idiots), Arjun Rampal (Ra.One, Om Shanti Om), Akshaye Khanna (Drishyam 2, Border), and Sara Arjun (Deiva Thirumagal, Saivam), all bringing intensity and depth to this gritty espionage thriller. The trailer promises larger-than-life action, emotional stakes, and a story fueled by revenge and patriotism.

#DhurandharTheRevenge #RanveerSingh #TrailerReaction #BollywoodReaction #SpyThriller #IndianCinema

snippet.title: Banjaare - Bairan (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
Banjaare - Bairan
Stream/Download ~

~ Music INFO ~
Title: Bairan
Singer/Lyricist/Composer: BANJAARE
Music: Roni
Mix-Master: Gurie
Animation : Ham_mah.10


~ Follow Banjaare ~ 
https://www.instagram.com/official_banjaare?igsh=eWd5MGIwbXpscThk&utm_source=qr

Lyrics ~ Banjaare - Bairan
Manne saambh-saambh raakhe
Tere jhanjhraa ke jode
Meri gel ro-ro ye bhi
Chhori bawle se hore

Manne aaye jaave khyaal tere
Khaaye jaave khyaal tere
Jeen konya deti
Haaye...
Bairi tanhaai manne

Geeta mein gaai kade
Chaati ke lagaai manne
Jit bhi gaya re
Teri yaad khadi paai manne

Saambh-saambh raakhi bahut
Chaati ke lagaai manne
Jit bhi gaya re
Teri yaad khadi paai manne

Ho...
Maarya-maarya phire
Dekh haal tu bichare ka
Tere bina jeena bhi
Ke jeena banjaare ka

Khoya rahun yaad teri
Kar ke nadaaniyaan
Batuwe mein rakhun teri
Saambh ke nishaaniyaan

Tere bina kaal horeya
Theek konya haal mera
Haath jodun Ram dede
Saansa te rihaai manne

Geeta mein gaai kade
Chaati ke lagaai manne
Jit bhi gaya re
Teri yaad khadi paai manne

Saambh-saambh raakhi bahut
Chaati ke lagaai re
Jit bhi gaya re
Teri yaad khadi paai re

Je tu thodi ghabra jya
Meri yaad tanne aa jya
Tu de diye awaaz re main
Aa jaaunga

Todun duniya ki reet
Re ke haar re ke jeet
Manne chahiye teri preet
Main nibha jaaunga

Dekh bawla bana gi
Manne likhna sikha gi
Haaye... noch-noch khaagi
Teri bairan judaai manne

Geeta mein gaai kade
Chaati ke lagaai manne
Jit bhi gaya re
Teri yaad khadi paai manne

Saambh-saambh raakhi bahut
Chaati ke lagaai re
Jit bhi gaya re
Teri yaad khadi paai re

Aaj taai nibhaun jo si
Kasam thi khaai manne
Zindagi saari ya meri
Tere lekhe laai manne

snippet.title: SHEESHA (Aakhya Mai Aakh Ghali Jo Beran) | Mitta Ror ft. Swara Verma | Out Now
snippet.description:
Jaizeey Music presents "Sheesha (Official Audio)", a new haryanvi song for 2026. This latest haryanvi song is sung by Mitta Ror and Swara Verma, with lyrics penned by Mitta Ror. The track, also known as "aakhya mein aankh mane ghali jo beran", is a must-listen for fans of haryanvi songs. You can find more of Mitta Ror in this sheesha mitta ror production.

snippet.title: Sanam Teri Kasam - 8K/4K Music Video | Harshvardhan Rane | Himesh Reshammiya | Ankit Tiwari, Palak M
snippet.description:
Relive the timeless romance with the stunning 8K/4K music video of "Sanam Teri Kasam" from the movie Sanam Teri Kasam. Featuring the heartfelt chemistry of Harshvardhan Rane and Mawra Hocane, this soulful track is beautifully composed by Himesh Reshammiya and sung by Ankit Tiwari and Palak Muchhal.

#sanamterikasam #8k #8kvideo #harshvardhanrane #mawrahocane #ankittiwari #palakmuchhal #himeshreshammiya 

Description:
Song - Sanam Teri Kasam
Singer - Ankit Tiwari, Palak Muchhal
Composer - Himesh Reshammiya
Lyricist - Himesh Reshammiya, Sameer Anjaan

Lyrics:
Betahasha dil ne
Tujhko hi chaaha hai
Har duaa mein maine
Tujhko hi maanga hai

Tera jaana jaise koi baddua
Tera jaana jaise koi baddua
Door jaaoge jo tum
Mar jaayenge hum
Sanam teri kasam o..
Sanam teri kasam o..
Sanam teri kasam..

Tumhe dekhte hi aankhen ho jaati namm
Sanam teri kasam o..
Sanam teri kasam o..
Sanam teri kasam..

Huaa ye kya hashar mera
Judaa huaa sabar mera
Main tere bin ek lamha
Kyun kabhi naa jiya

Raat bhar ashqo ne tujhko pukara hai
Har dua main maine tujhko hi maanga hai

Tera jaana jaise koi baddua
Door jaaoge jo tum
Mar jaayenge hum
Sanam teri kasam o..
Sanam teri kasam o..
Sanam teri kasam..

Tumhe dekhte hi aankhen ho jaati nam
Sanam teri kasam o..
Sanam teri kasam o..
Sanam teri kasam...

Nasha tera dil ko lagaa
Dena nahi mujhko dagaa
Main teri aadat ka maara
Hai kya meri khataa

Tere bin naamumkin
Apna guzaara hai
Har duaa mein maine
Tujhko hi maanga hai

Tera jaana jaise koi baddua
Door jaaoge jo tum
Mar jaayenge hum
Sanam teri kasam o..
Sanam teri kasam o..
Sanam teri kasam..

Tumhe dekhte hi aakhen ho jaati nam
Sanam teri kasam o..
Sanam teri kasam o..
Sanam teri kasam..

snippet.title: Disclosure Day | Official Trailer
snippet.description:
This summer everything will become clear. Disclosure Day in theaters 06.12.26.

If you found out we weren‚Äôt alone, if someone showed you, proved it to you, would that frighten you? This summer, the truth belongs to seven billion people. 
We are coming close to ‚Ä¶ Disclosure Day. 

Universal Pictures is proud to release a new original event film created and directed by Steven Spielberg. The film stars SAG winner and Oscar¬Æ nominee Emily Blunt (Oppenheimer, A Quiet Place), Emmy and Golden Globe winner Josh O‚ÄôConnor (Challengers, The Crown), Oscar¬Æ winner Colin Firth (The King‚Äôs Speech, Kingsman franchise), Eve Hewson (Bad Sisters, The Perfect Couple) and two-time Oscar¬Æ nominee Colman Domingo (Sing Sing, Rustin).
 
Based on a story by Spielberg, the screenplay is by David Koepp, whose previous work with Spielberg includes the scripts for Jurassic Park, The Lost World: Jurassic Park, War of the Worlds and Indiana Jones and the Kingdom of the Crystal Skull. Combined, those films earned more than $3 billion worldwide. Koepp also wrote the script for this 2025‚Äôs Jurassic World Rebirth. 

Disclosure Day is produced by five-time Academy Award¬Æ nominee Kristie Macosko Krieger (The Fabelmans, West Side Story) and by Spielberg for Amblin Entertainment. The executive producers are Adam Somner and Chris Brigham. 

Steven Spielberg is one of the industry‚Äôs most successful and influential filmmakers. The top-grossing director of all time, Spielberg has helmed such blockbusters as Jaws, E.T. The Extra-Terrestrial, the Indiana Jones franchise and Jurassic Park. 
 
Among his myriad honors, he is a three-time Academy Award¬Æ winner, including Oscars¬Æ for Best Director and Best Picture for Schindler‚Äôs List, which received a total of seven Oscars¬Æ, and for Best Director for Saving Private Ryan. His most recent film, The Fabelmans, was released by Universal in 2022 and received seven Academy Award¬Æ nominations, including for Directing, Best Original Screenplay, Best Actress and Best Picture.

snippet.title: Why Dhurandhar: The Revenge Could Be India‚Äôs BIGGEST EVER Movie
snippet.description:
In this video, we talk about the details seen in the Dhurandhar: The Revenge trailer. The trailer does not reveal much of the story, but some scenes give hints about the plot and how the story might move forward. We discuss how the film appears to focus on Pakistan‚Äôs proxy war tactics and how the narrative may develop around that theme. The trailer also seems to show parts of Ranveer Singh‚Äôs character‚Äôs early life before his mission connected to Pakistan. We also cover the strong reactions and discussions that started after the trailer was released, showing how much hype the movie has created. Reports suggest that another film, Toxic, postponed its release around the same time. We also discuss how newer directors like Aditya Dhar are bringing a different style and approach to Bollywood storytelling.

About The Sham Sharma Show 

The Sham Sharma is dedicated to raising a voice for India's indigenous culture. This channel looks at politics, culture, and pop culture and tries to make sense of things, past the bias and misinformation. The channel strives to debunk bias against India's native culture and campaign that all cultures and ideas be studied dispassionately and judged on their merits, history, and actions.

Main To Apne Saajan Ke Dwaar Chali Re

Main To Apne Saajan Ke Dwaar Chali Re

Maine Piya Ko Likh Di Hai Chitthi
Maine Piya Ko Likh Di Hai Chitthi

Tu Na Aa Tu Na Aa Main Aa Rahi Hoon
Sajan Sajan Sajan

Kab Tak Birahan, Birahan, Birahan, Birahan

Sancharame Music Credits
Song Composed, Arranged and Produced by Hesham Abdul Wahab.
Lyrics by Gorati Venkanna, 
Singers: Hesham Abdul Wahab, Gorati Venkanna

Tere piche chadhte main gharde mere

Kade kise shayar nu pyar na kareyo

Mera hoyea bura haal
